scripts.dev:android: pnpm run tailwind:build && pnpm run tailwind:watch & dx serve --android
scripts.dev:ios: pnpm run tailwind:build && pnpm run tailwind:watch & dx serve --ios
scripts.dev:iphone: xcrun simctl shutdown all 2>/dev/null; xcrun simctl boot 'iPhone 12' && open -a Simulator && pnpm run dev:ios
scripts.dev:ipad: xcrun simctl shutdown all 2>/dev/null; xcrun simctl boot 'iPad Pro 13-inch (M5)' && open -a Simulator && pnpm run dev:ios
scripts.dev:mobile: pkill -f emulator 2>/dev/null; emulator @Small_Phone_API_33 -no-audio -no-boot-anim & adb wait-for-device && pnpm run dev:android
scripts.dev:tablet: pkill -f emulator 2>/dev/null; emulator @Tablet_API_36 -no-audio -no-boot-anim & adb wait-for-device && pnpm run tailwind:build && pnpm run tailwind:watch & dx serve --android --device Tablet
